texto: It's going to be a hard time; we can count on that. But with all the misery, what opportunities to show mercy and brotherly love in our land, which has sinned so greatly against love. And patience! For now is the time when the victors, in the blind triumph of their victory, are likely to make mistakes. But that's not our concern, for we shall only be the sufferers, not the agents of suffering. What a power for peace will lie in our own powerlessness if we can only glimpse in it the sign of grace!
explicacao: Citação de Margot Benary-Isbert sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It's going to be a hard time; we can count on that. But with all the misery, what opportunities t…” articula amor, helplessness, paz em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como paz e suffering.

texto: Too bad people can't always be playing music, maybe then there wouldn't be any more wars.
explicacao: Citação de Margot Benary-Isbert sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Too bad people can't always be playing music, maybe then there wouldn't be any more wars.” articula reflexao, music, paz em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como paz e power-of-music.
